title: omphalotrix longipes
intro: Omphalotrix longipes, also known as the long-footed cord-club, is a type of fungus belonging to the family of Omphalotriaceae. The medicinal properties of Omphalotrix longipes include its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which can aid in the treatment of infections. The health benefits of this fungus are still being researched, but it may have applications in wound healing and as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of Omphalotrix longipes can be found in the form of extracts or tinctures, which may be used topically or in combination with other natural remedies.
